zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Peche於1386年4月30日出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，她的父親John Pecche26歲，母親Katherine27歲。她於1399年與Sir William de Montfort在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1417年4月之前，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲阿爾德里奇。

nameMeanings.name: Peche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Pech   ‘pitch, tar’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Peče or of its Germanized form Petsche , which is also a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname.

variants.name: Pech
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alvaro, Diego, Edelmira, Emilio, Francisco, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose Angel.  German Gerhard, Hans, Ilse, Lutz, Manfred, Wolf.

Czech and Slovak; Sorbian (Pěch and P'ech): from a pet form of the personal name Petr (Czech), Pětš (Lower Sorbian), and Peter (Slovak). This is also a Germanized form of the Upper Sorbian cognate Pjech.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German pech (German Pech) ‘pitch, tar’, presumably a nickname for someone with exceptionally dark skin or hair, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch. This may in part also be the origin of a homonymic Polish, Czech, and Slovak surname (compare above and below).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Peche was born on 30 April 1386, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Pecche, was 26 and her mother, Katherine, was 27. She married Sir William de Montfort in 1399, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died before April 1417, and was buried in Aldridge, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Peche est née le 30 avril 1386, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Pecche, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Katherine, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Montfort en 1399, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée avant avril 1417, et a été enterrée à Aldridge, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Peche am 30. April 1386 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Pecche 26 und ihre Mutter Katherine 27. Sie hat 1399 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William de Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb vor April 1417 und wurde in Aldridge, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Pecheが1386年4月30日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Peccheは26歳，母Katherineは27歳であった。1399年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでSir William de Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1417年4月以前に死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ミドランズアルドリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Peche(이)가 1386년 4월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Pecche(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Sir William de Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 4월 이전 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 올드리지에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Peche родилась 30 апреля 1386 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Pecche было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Montfort в 1399 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла перед апрель 1417 г. и была похоронена в местности алдридж, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания.
